creator: nxiv@my-deja.com
text:
The problem starts to manifest itself by dropping 'A' keys when I'm
typing at the local keyboard.  Soon the machine locks up completely and
requires a reset or power cycle. I am running ncplib, mars_nwe and user
PPP on this system.  After reading this PR, I have disabled VM86 and
VESA in my config.  I have a dual PPro-166 system with an Intel PR440FX
motherboard.
